body.title: CLOSED: refractory window for coherence/confab detectors
body.result: refractory window for coherence+confab detectors — 3 files, 3 test files, all tests green, commit d3c91429
body.description:
Pass-2 area_4 finding: coherence inhibitor and action_claim_verifier re-fire on consecutive turns even when the trigger is stale. Add a refractory window: each detector checks ring_memory for a recent failure within the last N turns and suppresses re-fire (still logs, doesn't push TWM).

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/response_coherence_inhibitor.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/action_claim_verifier.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — ring_memory ring check + suppression flag, no detection logic changes. OUT — changing what triggers coherence/action-claim detection.
**Test plan:** Write two consecutive turns that both trigger the detector; second turn should log 'refractory suppressed' and not push TWM.
**Pass condition:** test verifies that detector fires on turn 1, logs 'refractory suppressed' on turn 2, and TWM push count == 1 not 2.
